titleStmt.title: SII 11.156: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 156. (B.K. No. 118 of 1926-27.) KAṆVI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON THE WALL (LEFT OF ENTRANCE) OF THE ĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 30, Pārthiva, Pushya, śu. 2, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1105, December 10, Sunday. It registers a gift by Ajji-Gāvuṇḍa, who was administering Kaṇivūr, for the beatitude of his father Jayadēva Gāvuṇḍa. A Śaiva teacher named Indraśivadēvāchāryya, who was the royal preceptor (Rājaguru) and the head of the temple of Śōbhanēśvaradēva at Muḷugunda and other Śiva temples in the Seven-and-a-half-lakh country is eulogised.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jayatyumālatāśliṣṭaśivakalpamahīruhaḥ . brahmēṁdrādyamarānīkavāṁḻatārttha phaḻapradaḥ ©
vṛtta . tribhuvanavarttikīrtti subhalakṣaṇalakṣitabhadramūrtti dōrvvibhavavinirjjitāri duraghabradahā
ri yivaṁ diṭaṁ jaga kkabhinavacakriyeṁ dabhijanaṁ pogaḷuttire mecci biccataṁ tribhuvanamalla cakri paripā
ḷisutirdda naśēṣadhātriyaṁ . vṛttaṁ . vāridhivēṣṭitākhiḻadharātaḷamadhyadoḷāda moppuguṁ mēru ka
ḷakke mēṭiyavolā kanakādriya dakṣiṇāśeyoḷu bhāratavarṣa muṁ ṭadaṟo ḷippudu kuṁtaḷadēśa valli vistārisi ce
lvettudu manōjana tōḷvaladaṁte beḷvala . Allirddāgaravanitaṟoḷellaṁ celviṁge kaṇiyidallade peṟatoṁdilleṁdu meccibaṇni
sa balla rnnegarddirddudalte kaṇi dāriṇiyoḷ . v® . Eḷedaḷirvvēṟidāṁbrataru keṁdaḷirddoṁgala nāṁtaśōke kāygaḷa hoṟevotta teṁgala
rdda mallige taḷtelevaḷḷi paṇtu taṇmaleva mayiṁdavāḷe nanevottadirmutte beḍaṁga nāvagaṁ taḷedire tatpurōpavanavēnasadirpudo nāḍe nōḍe
yuṁ . Adalladeyuṁ . Adu dēvāyatanōththitadhvajapatākānīkadiṁ dēvalōkada celvaṁ karevantirippudadu nānāvastusaṁtānasaṁ
padavā dāvaṇadiṁ kubērapuramaṁ ṟōḍāḍi mikkaṁtirippudu rārājitaramyaharmmyakaḷaśaṁ prōllēkhanāṁbhōdhara . kaṁda . takka
riva rmmānyariva rmmikkariva rgguṇigaḷivarenaḷnegaḷdēḷnūṟokkalamakkaḷi nesedudu nikkuvena kaṇiya peṁpa nēvaṇnipudo . Ā pura
doḷippa nudyatukōpānaḷakabaḷitāribaḷa nakhiḷāśāvyāpitaviśāḷakīrtti dayāpati jaya patigavuṇḍa nāhavaśau
ṇḍaṁ . Ātana vīramuṁ vitaraṇamu meṁteṁdaḍe . vṛtta . birudaṁ biṭṭu podarppugeṭṭu bhayadiṁ bāyviṭṭu beṁgoṭṭu saṁgarado ddari
nāyaka rnnijabhujāvaṣṭaṁbhamaṁ baṇnisuttira lōraṁtire tāḷdi bīrasiriyaṁ vikhyātivettaṁ dharādharadhairyyaṁ jayadēvanaṁ
pogaḷguviśvaṁbharāmaṇḍaḷaṁ . kaṁda . dayeyiṁ surabhūjaṁ niścayavīga ḷmanujamūrtti vettirddapu durbbiyo ḷentu jagajjanaṁ sale ja
yadēvagauvuṇḍa nīva nā rbbēḍidoḍaṁ . Ā jayadēvagauvuṇḍaṁgī jaga vabhivarnnisalu manaḥpriyeyādaḷu rāji
tasadguṇaniḷayapayōjāyitacāruvaktre dēkigauvu(ṁ)ṇḍi . Ā dēkigauvuṇḍiga(ṁ) vāsāditasitakīrti jayakigāvu
ṇḍaṁgaṁ mēdini pogaḷvinnegaṁ maganādaṁ sucaritraniḷaya najjigauṇḍaṁ . Ātaṁ dānadoḷuṁ ravijātaṁgaṁ parahitārtthadoḷu khaca
raṁgaṁ nītiyoḷamarējyakhyātanenalu negarddanī dharāmaṇḍaḷadoḷu . Antanisidajji gavuṇḍaṁ tana gadhināthanāge patibhaktiyo
ḷōraṁ tasagidaḷārāmana kā(ṁ)ntevolīkāntayenisi haḷḷigavuṇḍi . Ā daṁpatigaḷge janāhlādakaraṁ puṭṭidaṁ suputraṁ
nijavaṁśōdayasudhākaraṁ mahimōdaya nudyaduguṇākaraṁ jayadēvaṁ . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāra
ṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhisīlasaṁpannaruṁ . śabdārtthaśāstrabyutupannaruṁ . trilōka vijayabhujabaḷapramattamadana
madamahāndhakārabandhavighaṭanapaṭiṣṭhanijatapaḥpradīpaghanakāntikāṁtaruṁ saṁśritajanamākaṁda naṁdanavasantaruṁ . duraṁtadu
ritaghanaghaṭāpraḷeyakāraṇasamiraṇaruṁ . samyajñānasantāraṇaruṁ . cāḷukyacakravartti permmāḍirāyapūjitacaraṇasa
rōjaruṁ . vibudhajanakaḷpabhujaru menisi rājagurugaḷappiṁdraśivadēvācāryya rmmuḷuguṁdada sōbhanēśvaradēvara sthā
navādiyāge saptārddhalakṣeya śivaliṁgadēvara sthānaṁgaḷaṁ sukhadināḷuttirddaru . vri . sāṁdra khiḷadigvaḷayaṁ vi
namrabhūpēṁdraśirōmaṇidyutivirājitapādayugaṁ budhāśrayaṁ caṁdrakaḷāvataṁśamayōṁbujacaṇḍamarīcimāḷiyeṁdiṁdra
śivavratīśvarananurvvare baṇnisuguṁ niraṁtaraṁ . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāya dhyānadhāraṇa
mōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhisaṁpanna ruvanēkatarkkaśāstrapārāvārapāragaruṁ . śivadharmma ramyaharmmyamaṇikaḷasa
ruṁ . dīnānāthayūthasaṁrakṣaṇaikadakṣaruṁ . saṁśritajanakalpavrikṣaru(ṁ)menisi . śivadharmmāṁ bhōdhisaṁvarddha
natuhinakaraṁ cārucāritramākaṁdavasantaṁ śabdavidyāprathitaprithulatāḷaṁbanaṁ nitya dānaikavinōdaṁ vyāpakaṁ tā
nene negaḻda niḷācakrado ḷśīlalakṣmīdhava nātumōdyattapōgnigrasitamanasijaṁ sāmavēdibratīṁdraṁ . tacchiṣyaṁ viśvalōkapraṇuta
nakhiḷavidyāgamācāryyavaryyaṁ sacchāṁdōdagravajrasphuṭitavrijinakutukīḷanajñānakāṇḍaṁ taccheṣyaṁ nyāyadakṣaṁ para
hitanirataṁ tānenuttuṁ pogaḷuguṁ svacchaṁdaṁ jñānasaktibratiya nanudinaṁ satukavi brātavellaṁ . manamaṁ durvyasanakke
dindu sanda lōkada pavādakke dummanadiṁ dūrisutirppa
tāpasa radeṁtuṁ jñānaśakutibratīṁdrananēṁ pōlvare lōbha
viyeṁduṁ jñānāṁbhōnidhānavarddhanaśaśiyeṁduṁ jñānaśakutimuniyaṁ tajña rsūgaṁgoṇḍu baṇni pardhāriṇayo
ḷesevī tanmunipatiśiṣyaṁ sanumukhamaṇiruciramukura nātumatapassaṁpanumahitanenisi negaḷdaṁ sanuma
ti lakuḷīśvaraṁ dharāma(ṁ)ṇḍaḷadoḷu . vṛta . haracaraṇābjado ḷmanama nūrjjitadharmma doḷūrjjitātmamaṁ nirupamamāda vīratapa
doḷtanuvaṁ nilisiṭṭu kīrttivallari neṟe parvvi bhūbhavanamaṁ pesarvvettananutte rāgadiṁ satukavīśvaratati baṇnikuṁ lakuḷīśvara
naṁ niraṁtara . Akaṭeṁdu karuṇadiṁ yācakaraṁ poreyalu kalpakujaṁ baṁdaṁta gaḍa lakuḷīśvarasūri
duritanīradapavanaṁ . svasti niratiśayacārucāritraviratanuṁ sakaḷaguṇabharitanuṁ dīnānāthakalpabhūjanuṁ nirupa
matējanuṁ śaraṇāgatajanajaḷanidhiyuṁ kāruṇyaratsanidhiyuṁ duṣṭa vidviṣṭa hṛdayasellanuṁ jasaveṇgenallanuṁ venisi
danī yajjigāvuṇḍaṁ kaṇivūra nēkabhōgadināḷuttirddu svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikrama kālada 30 neya pārtthivasaṁva
tsarada puṣya śuddha 2 Ādivāra saṁkramaṇadaṁdu mahāmunigaḷappa jñānasakutidēvara kālaṁkarcci kaidhāre Eṟedu
tammayyanappa jayadēvagavuṇḍana parōkṣakkeṁdu Ajjigāvuṇḍaṁ śrīmūlasthāna dēvaraṁga bhōga navakarmma khaṇḍasphuṭitajī
rṇnōddhārakkaṁ sarvvanamaśyamuṁ sarvvabādhāparihāramumāgi kaḍita nāganakeṟeyiṁ keḷage biṭṭa tōṁṭavondu . svasti śrī
Digital edition of SII 11.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
